transcript.clean_text: foreign is in its final stages and you can watch it live and On Demand on gcn Plus another sunny day plenty of riders up for it others will have been feeling the legs after a hellish day in the mountains that apologachar lost ground and most likely lost the Tour de France in stage 17 but stage 18 was meant to provide opportunities to the sprinters plenty of riders looking to take what will be a first victory of the race Sam welshwood was there but could they beat Jasper Phillips a four-time stage winner so far in this race the yellow Jersey Jonas viagara and Company set off from mutier and headed to buhonbreze for the third ever stage finish there just under 185 kilometers the longest of the four remaining stages of this tour two fourth category climbs an intermediate Sprint not too much to prevent the sprinters from doing their business all eyes were on the start to see if the Breakaway would be a big one we soon got a pretty clear answer no it wouldn't three Riders away ice cream Victor cabinets and Jonas Abramson a little surprise maybe given the fact that too many sprinters left in the race some tremendous scenery on the way like the might be sent to the naughty step for that one Bashir would try as well and the Gap was kept very tight all day that she would be brought back guess you would have to abandon after another hard date and ain't corn would go again this time nobody chasing him Victor cabinarts waiting for him and with 60 kilometers to go the three became four no it was becoming less and less 43 seconds at this point it didn't look like they stood a prayer 50 kilometers to go and just over 53 seconds philipson coming in to take the remaining points in the Sprint and still plenty of commitment for the likes of alpacinda kernick Jayco alula Anderson the Gap was down to 47 seconds with 23 kilometers remaining twisting and turning headwind sidewind Road Furniture it was all thrown into the mix they got down to 20 seconds and less with five and a half K's to go the sprinters were ready for action so now Quick Step we were asking up there we're trying to spoil things not every Sprint team though wanting to commit full gas everybody approached the final three kilometers the safe zone for the GC Riders and just eight seconds it looked as though it was heartbreak for the Breakaway Astana Kazakhstan were lining things up and we got into the final 700 meters they still hadn't been caught though alpacinda kernick getting together jaycar Lula following them the Sprinter battle be launched and Victor campenards with one of the biggest turns you'll ever see it gave them a bit more to dream it gave them a bit more to go go and dream they did our screen leading it out in corn trying to get around him some on the other side of the road and over the lip onto the flat final 50 meters kisper are screen dead to dream and brought home the dream result for sudal Quick Step 18 days it took them to get a stage when the wolf pack though always wins a tour of Florida's winner a few years ago beating machiave on a ball in the Sprint that time it was two up this time it was asking versus the entire Peloton had he still won this appointment behind for those who'd hope for a fast finish put Delight for Tim declerc and the rest of sudar quickstep Kasper ice cream winning a Tour de France stage for the first time in his career beating incorn Abramson and the rest coming in with the sprinters Phillips are winning that split again this time though it was for fourth place no fifth stage win yet but green jersey still Jasper Phillips are with 352 points 150 in front of his closest rival who's now Mars Pearson another day Daniel Jersey untroubled double door to the end but you never know it's never over until it's over but a 7 minute 35 second Gap is as good as you can ask for in the Tour de France second his teammate Adam Yates sister so this age 19 as they dick away and we go towards Paris on the way to Pauline 172.8 kilometers and this one has Breakaway written all over it unless the sprinters can really control things it'll be an even more difficult task that it was on stage 18. stage 19 with over 2 000 meters of climbing plenty of up and down only two classified climbs but it'll be an exciting race to watch and you can watch it live and On Demand on gcn Plus thank you
